Class MutableSortedMapFactoryImpl

java.lang.Object
org.eclipse.collections.impl.map.sorted.mutable.MutableSortedMapFactoryImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
MutableSortedMapFactory
public class MutableSortedMapFactoryImpl extends Object implements MutableSortedMapFactory
